title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXCVI. Games.
content:
See, saw, Margery Daw,
            Little Jackey shall have a new master;
        Little Jackey shall have but a penny a day,
            Because he can't work any faster.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXCVI. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
